expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the run explicitly enumerates the case focus as required coverage: “explicit coverage of: - hyperlink styling distinction, - contextual navigation behavior, - fallback rendering safety.” It further lists concrete items under “Advisory note” for all three (styling distinction, navigation behavior, fallback rendering safety).

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is framed and evaluated against Phase 5b requirements throughout, e.g., result.md: “This benchmark requires demonstrating Phase 5b (shipment-checkpoint) review + refactor alignment …” and “What was expected for Phase 5b (per skill snapshot contract)” listing the Phase 5b artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, phase5b draft). execution_notes.md similarly states: “Checked Phase 5b contract requirements … from review-rubric-phase5b.md”.
